mapper.select: select id, username, password_hash, real_name, role_code, phone, email, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user where username = #{username} limit 1
select id, username, password_hash, real_name, role_code, phone, email, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user where id = #{id} limit 1

where.if: and (username like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or real_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
select id, username, password_hash, real_name, role_code, phone, email, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at from sys_user
order by id desc limit #{size} offset #{offset}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_user (id, username, password_hash, real_name, role_code, phone, email, avatar_url, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{roleCode}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update sys_user set real_name = #{realName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update sys_user set status = 0, username = concat(username, '_deleted_', id), updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
